name: Butterfinger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar.
2. Add the egg whites to the mixture and beat well.
3. Blend in the peanut butter and vanilla extract.
4. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Mix these dry ingredients into the creamy mixture until combined.
6. Stir in the chopped Butterfinger candy bars.
7. Form the dough into 1 1/2 inch balls and place them on a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Allow to cool on a rack.
